feed.title: Junfeng Ren
feed.subtitle: Ph.D. Applicant | Computer Vision | 3D Occupancy Prediction

entry.title: Hello World: Embarking on 3D Semantic Occupancy Prediction

link.title: Hello World: Embarking on 3D Semantic Occupancy Prediction

entry.content:
Welcome to my digital garden!

This space is dedicated to my journey in Computer Vision. Here, I will be documenting my research progress, diving deep into the architecture of Vision Transformers (ViT), and sharing my experiences developing efficient frameworks for cooperative perception.

What’s Next?

In the upcoming posts, I plan to share:

  • Detailed technical notes on my framework LiteTokenOcc.
  • Mathematical derivations for statistical learning theory.
  • Algorithmic problem-solving strategies.

Stay tuned!

Testing LaTeX rendering: The core attention mechanism can be expressed as: \(\text{Attention}(Q, K, V) = \text{softmax}\left(\frac{QK^T}{\sqrt{d_k}}\right)V\)
entry.summary: Setting up my academic digital garden and research notes.
